analytics.followMainLiftStrength: Follow the direction of your main lift strength.
analytics.tonnageByWeek: Tonnage by week across all logged exercises.
analytics.howMuchPlannedWork: How much of the planned work was completed.
analytics.intensityBalance: Intensity balance from easier work to high-effort sets.

settings.recoveryKeyCreated: Recovery Key created. Store it securely.
settings.checksumMismatch: Snapshot checksum mismatch. Data may be corrupted.
settings.backupWebOnly: Backup export is available on web only.

guidance.stopAddingLoadMessage: Recent sets are too close to failure. Keep the next set conservative or end this exercise.
guidance.reduceNextSetMessage: The last set was harder than target. Drop 2.5–5% to stay in the planned RPE zone.
guidance.addALittleWeightMessage: The last set was easier than target. Add 2.5–5% if technique felt solid.
guidance.holdThisLoadMessage: The last set landed near the target RPE. Keep the same weight for the next set.
guidance.overshotRpe: Set {{setNumber}} overshot planned RPE by {{deviation}}. Consider reducing weight 2.5-5%.
guidance.undershotRpe: Set {{setNumber}} undershot planned RPE by {{deviation}}. Consider a small weight increase.
guidance.consecutiveOvershoot: Two consecutive completed sets overshot the planned RPE. Stop adding load or reduce weight.
guidance.mainLiftCompletionLow: Main lift completion rate is {{rate}}%, below the 80% target.
